content: The installed Tonal 4.9.0 declarations and module source show time-signature get accepts broader literals, returns a discriminated empty result, supports additive numerators, and computes classification; duration-value get returns an empty sentinel or duration metadata. Current project music-domain code intentionally narrows and stabilizes these APIs while keeping product-supported signatures separate, so removing that facade would spread third-party shapes and behavior rather than simplify ownership.
